vllm.title: Make InternLM follow `rope_scaling` in `config.json`
vllm.author: theFool32
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Currently, InternLM model will not use the rope_scaling parameter for get_rope function, which results in the error of
probability tensor contains either inf, nan or element < 0 

for long context inputs.

vllm.title: Fix quickstart.rst example
vllm.author: gottlike
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This confused me a bit, but I figured it's just a typo (was .json instead of .jinja)

vllm.title: Adding number of nvcc_threads during build as envar
vllm.author: AguirreNicolas
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Issue: #1782

[ADD] Option to add --build-arg nvcc_threads to be used during docker building as NVCC_THREADS envar in setup.py to prevent OOM.

Add ROCm- Support
